disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden sharp tearing left-upper-quadrant pain radiating to the left shoulder, on a background of months of left-sided fullness
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly is the pain and does it spread anywhere?
What does the pain feel like and when did it start?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's under my left ribs, sharp and tearing, and it shoots up to my left shoulder. The heaviness there has been building for months but this sharp pain only started tonight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain is worse on deep inspiration and on movement; patient splinting the left abdomen
trigger_question_examples: Does anything make the pain worse?
What happens when you take a deep breath?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Breathing in deeply makes it much worse, and so does moving or twisting, so I'm sitting very still holding a pillow against my side.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High fever and drenching sweats accompanying the acute pain
trigger_question_examples: Do you have a fever or sweats?
Have you felt hot or shivery?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I'm burning up and drenched in sweat, soaked right through my clothes, and the home thermometer said 38.2.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long-standing left-upper-abdominal fullness, early satiety and unintentional weight loss (~8 kg) with profound fatigue
trigger_question_examples: Has anything been going on with your health over the last few months?
Have you lost weight or noticed changes in your appetite?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For months my left side has felt full and hard, I fill up after a few bites, I've lost about 8 kg without trying and I'm exhausted all the time.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New spontaneous bruising on the legs and marked pallor
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any easy bruising or bleeding?
Do you look paler than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, some bruises have come up on my legs without me knocking them, and my wife says I look really pale.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Deep aching bone pain in both thighs
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any aches or pains elsewhere, like in your bones?
Any pain in your legs or thighs?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I've got a deep dull ache in both thighs, in the bones themselves it feels like.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Paracetamol taken with no effect on pain or fever
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for the pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I took paracetamol earlier and it did absolutely nothing for the pain or the fever.
